body_plan.core_shape: elongated feline quadruped body with a double-humped back

parts.shape: walrus-like with elongated muzzle and jowls
branching deer-like antlers with multiple points

parts.placement: side of head, visible in profile

parts.shape: furry raised humps like a camel
thick tiger-striped legs with pale paws
parts.placement: underside of body, two front two back

parts.shape: long bushy tail with white tuft at tip

distinctive_features: walrus-style tusks jutting from a deer-antlered head
one large floppy pink-lined ear visible in profile
two furry camel-like humps along the spine
long tail with fluffy white-tipped tuft
locomotion: quadrupedal walking gait, slow and heavy-footed like a big cat
vibe: a tusked, antlered tiger-camel hybrid ambling along with regal, ancient calm
